```{r context="server", echo=FALSE}
    req(input$k_binomial)
    req(input$p_binomial)
    
    media_teorica <- input$k_binomial * input$p_binomial
    
    desviacion_teorica <- sqrt(
      (
        input$k_binomial *
        input$p_binomial *
        (1 - input$p_binomial)
      ) / input$n
    )
    
    texto <- paste0(
      
      "Simulación realizada con ",
      input$simulaciones,
      " muestras de tamaño ",
      input$n,
      
      "<br><br>",
      
      "Media teórica de las medias muestrales = ",
      round(media_teorica, 4),
      
      "<br>",
      
      "Desviación estándar teórica de las medias muestrales = ",
      round(desviacion_teorica, 4)
      
    )
    
  }
  
  HTML(
    
    paste0(
      
      "<div style='
      background-color:#f8f9fa;
      padding:18px;
      border-radius:12px;
      font-size:24px;
      font-weight:bold;
      text-align:center;
      color:#003366;
      border:2px solid #d6d6d6;
      margin-top:10px;
      '>",
      
      texto,
      
      "</div>"
      
    )
    
  )
  
})
```

```{r context="server", echo=FALSE}
grafica_base <- reactive({
  
  # =====================================
  # DISTRIBUCIÓN NORMAL
  # =====================================
  
  if(input$distribucion == "Normal"){
    
    req(input$media)
    req(input$desviacion)
    req(input$tipo_prob)
    
    media <- input$media
    desviacion <- input$desviacion
    
    x <- seq(
      media - 4 * desviacion,
      media + 4 * desviacion,
      length.out = 2000
    )
    
    y <- dnorm(x, mean = media, sd = desviacion)
    
    datos <- data.frame(x, y)
    
    grafica <- ggplot2::ggplot(
      datos,
      ggplot2::aes(x = x, y = y)
    ) +
      ggplot2::geom_line(
        linewidth = 1.5,
        color = "#0033ff"
      ) +
      ggplot2::theme_minimal(base_size = 15) +
      ggplot2::theme(
        plot.title = ggplot2::element_text(
          face = "bold",
          size = 20,
          hjust = 0.5
        )
      ) +
      ggplot2::labs(
        title = stringr::str_wrap(input$titulo_grafica, width = 45),
        x = "Valores",
        y = "Densidad"
      )
    
    if(input$tipo_prob == "menor"){
      
      req(input$limite)
      
      sombra <- subset(datos, x <= input$limite)
      
      grafica <- grafica +
        ggplot2::geom_area(
          data = sombra,
          fill = "#4a90e2",
          alpha = 0.45
        ) +
        ggplot2::geom_vline(
          xintercept = input$limite,
          linetype = "dashed",
          linewidth = 1.2,
          color = "red"
        )
      
    }
    
    else if(input$tipo_prob == "mayor"){
      
      req(input$limite)
      
      sombra <- subset(datos, x >= input$limite)
      
      grafica <- grafica +
        ggplot2::geom_area(
          data = sombra,
          fill = "#4a90e2",
          alpha = 0.45
        ) +
        ggplot2::geom_vline(
          xintercept = input$limite,
          linetype = "dashed",
          linewidth = 1.2,
          color = "red"
        )
      
    }
    
    else if(input$tipo_prob == "entre"){
      
      req(input$limite_inferior)
      req(input$limite_superior)
      
      sombra <- subset(
        datos,
        x >= input$limite_inferior &
          x <= input$limite_superior
      )
      
      grafica <- grafica +
        ggplot2::geom_area(
          data = sombra,
          fill = "#4a90e2",
          alpha = 0.45
        ) +
        ggplot2::geom_vline(
          xintercept = c(
            input$limite_inferior,
            input$limite_superior
          ),
          linetype = "dashed",
          linewidth = 1.2,
          color = "red"
        )
      
    }
    
  }
  
  # =====================================
  # T STUDENT
  # =====================================
  
  else if(input$distribucion == "T Student"){
    
    req(input$gl)
    req(input$tipo_prob)
    
    gl <- input$gl
    
    x <- seq(
      qt(0.001, df = gl),
      qt(0.999, df = gl),
      length.out = 2000
    )
    
    y <- dt(x, df = gl)
    
    datos <- data.frame(x, y)
    
    grafica <- ggplot2::ggplot(
  datos,
  ggplot2::aes(x = x, y = y)
) +
  ggplot2::geom_line(
    linewidth = 1.5,
    color = "#009933"
  ) +
  ggplot2::theme_minimal(base_size = 15) +
  
  ggplot2::theme(
    plot.title = ggplot2::element_text(
      face = "bold",
      size = 20,
      hjust = 0.5
    )
  ) +
  
  ggplot2::labs(
    title = stringr::str_wrap(input$titulo_grafica, width = 45),
    x = "Valores",
    y = "Densidad"
  )
    
    if(input$tipo_prob == "menor"){
      
      req(input$limite)
      
      sombra <- subset(datos, x <= input$limite)
      
      grafica <- grafica +
        ggplot2::geom_area(
          data = sombra,
          fill = "#66cc99",
          alpha = 0.45
        ) +
        ggplot2::geom_vline(
          xintercept = input$limite,
          linetype = "dashed",
          color = "red"
        )
      
    }
    
    else if(input$tipo_prob == "mayor"){
      
      req(input$limite)
      
      sombra <- subset(datos, x >= input$limite)
      
      grafica <- grafica +
        ggplot2::geom_area(
          data = sombra,
          fill = "#66cc99",
          alpha = 0.45
        ) +
        ggplot2::geom_vline(
          xintercept = input$limite,
          linetype = "dashed",
          color = "red"
        )
      
    }
    
    else{
      
      req(input$limite_inferior)
      req(input$limite_superior)
      
      sombra <- subset(
        datos,
        x >= input$limite_inferior &
          x <= input$limite_superior
      )
      
      grafica <- grafica +
        ggplot2::geom_area(
          data = sombra,
          fill = "#66cc99",
          alpha = 0.45
        ) +
        ggplot2::geom_vline(
          xintercept = c(
            input$limite_inferior,
            input$limite_superior
          ),
          linetype = "dashed",
          color = "red"
        )
      
    }
    
  }
  
  # =====================================
  # CHI CUADRADO
  # =====================================
  
  else if(input$distribucion == "Chi Cuadrado"){
    
    req(input$gl_chi)
    req(input$tipo_prob)
    
    gl <- input$gl_chi
    
    x <- seq(
      0,
      qchisq(0.999, df = gl),
      length.out = 2000
    )
    
    y <- dchisq(x, df = gl)
    
    datos <- data.frame(x, y)
    
    grafica <- ggplot2::ggplot(
  datos,
  ggplot2::aes(x = x, y = y)
) +
  ggplot2::geom_line(
    linewidth = 1.5,
    color = "#cc6600"
  ) +
  ggplot2::theme_minimal(base_size = 15) +
  
  ggplot2::theme(
    plot.title = ggplot2::element_text(
      face = "bold",
      size = 20,
      hjust = 0.5
    )
  ) +
  
  ggplot2::labs(
    title = stringr::str_wrap(input$titulo_grafica, width = 45),
    x = "Valores",
    y = "Densidad"
  )
    if(input$tipo_prob == "menor"){
      
      req(input$limite)
      
      sombra <- subset(datos, x <= input$limite)
      
      grafica <- grafica +
        ggplot2::geom_area(
          data = sombra,
          fill = "#ffb366",
          alpha = 0.45
        ) +
        ggplot2::geom_vline(
          xintercept = input$limite,
          linetype = "dashed",
          color = "red"
        )
      
    }
    
    else if(input$tipo_prob == "mayor"){
      
      req(input$limite)
      
      sombra <- subset(datos, x >= input$limite)
      
      grafica <- grafica +
        ggplot2::geom_area(
          data = sombra,
          fill = "#ffb366",
          alpha = 0.45
        ) +
        ggplot2::geom_vline(
          xintercept = input$limite,
          linetype = "dashed",
          color = "red"
        )
      
    }
    
    else{
      
      req(input$limite_inferior)
      req(input$limite_superior)
      
      sombra <- subset(
        datos,
        x >= input$limite_inferior &
          x <= input$limite_superior
      )
      
      grafica <- grafica +
        ggplot2::geom_area(
          data = sombra,
          fill = "#ffb366",
          alpha = 0.45
        ) +
        ggplot2::geom_vline(
          xintercept = c(
            input$limite_inferior,
            input$limite_superior
          ),
          linetype = "dashed",
          color = "red"
        )
      
    }
    
  }
  
  # =====================================
  # F FISHER
  # =====================================
  
  else if(input$distribucion == "F Fisher"){
    
    req(input$gl1)
    req(input$gl2)
    req(input$tipo_prob)
    
    gl1 <- input$gl1
    gl2 <- input$gl2
    
    x <- seq(
      0,
      qf(0.999, df1 = gl1, df2 = gl2),
      length.out = 2000
    )
    
    y <- df(x, df1 = gl1, df2 = gl2)
    
    datos <- data.frame(x, y)
    
    grafica <- ggplot2::ggplot(
  datos,
  ggplot2::aes(x = x, y = y)
) +
  ggplot2::geom_line(
    linewidth = 1.5,
    color = "#9900cc"
  ) +
  ggplot2::theme_minimal(base_size = 15) +
  
  ggplot2::theme(
    plot.title = ggplot2::element_text(
      face = "bold",
      size = 20,
      hjust = 0.5
    )
  ) +
  
  ggplot2::labs(
    title = stringr::str_wrap(input$titulo_grafica, width = 45),
    x = "Valores",
    y = "Densidad"
  )
    
    if(input$tipo_prob == "menor"){
      
      req(input$limite)
      
      sombra <- subset(datos, x <= input$limite)
      
      grafica <- grafica +
        ggplot2::geom_area(
          data = sombra,
          fill = "#cc99ff",
          alpha = 0.45
        ) +
        ggplot2::geom_vline(
          xintercept = input$limite,
          linetype = "dashed",
          color = "red"
        )
      
    }
    
    else if(input$tipo_prob == "mayor"){
      
      req(input$limite)
      
      sombra <- subset(datos, x >= input$limite)
      
      grafica <- grafica +
        ggplot2::geom_area(
          data = sombra,
          fill = "#cc99ff",
          alpha = 0.45
        ) +
        ggplot2::geom_vline(
          xintercept = input$limite,
          linetype = "dashed",
          color = "red"
        )
      
    }
    
    else{
      
      req(input$limite_inferior)
      req(input$limite_superior)
      
      sombra <- subset(
        datos,
        x >= input$limite_inferior &
          x <= input$limite_superior
      )
      
      grafica <- grafica +
        ggplot2::geom_area(
          data = sombra,
          fill = "#cc99ff",
          alpha = 0.45
        ) +
        ggplot2::geom_vline(
          xintercept = c(
            input$limite_inferior,
            input$limite_superior
          ),
          linetype = "dashed",
          color = "red"
        )
      
    }
    
  }
  
  # =====================================
  # TLC
  # =====================================
  
  else if(input$distribucion == "TLC"){
    
    req(input$n)
    req(input$simulaciones)
    req(input$k_binomial)
    req(input$p_binomial)
    
    medias <- replicate(
      input$simulaciones,
      {
        mean(
          rbinom(
            input$n,
            size = input$k_binomial,
            prob = input$p_binomial
          )
        )
      }
    )
    
    datos <- data.frame(medias = medias)
    
    media_teorica <- input$k_binomial * input$p_binomial
    
    desviacion_teorica <- sqrt(
      (
        input$k_binomial *
        input$p_binomial *
        (1 - input$p_binomial)
      ) / input$n
    )
    
    x_normal <- seq(
      min(medias),
      max(medias),
      length.out = 1000
    )
    
    df_normal <- data.frame(
      x = x_normal,
      y = dnorm(
        x_normal,
        mean = media_teorica,
        sd = desviacion_teorica
      )
    )
    
    grafica <- ggplot2::ggplot(
  datos,
  ggplot2::aes(x = medias)
) +
  
  ggplot2::geom_histogram(
    ggplot2::aes(y = ..density..),
    bins = 30,
    fill = "#91cc02",
    color = "white",
    alpha = 0.75
  ) +
  
  ggplot2::geom_line(
    data = df_normal,
    ggplot2::aes(x = x, y = y),
    color = "red",
    linewidth = 1.3
  ) +
  
  ggplot2::geom_vline(
    xintercept = media_teorica,
    linetype = "dashed",
    color = "#003366",
    linewidth = 1.2
  ) +
  
  ggplot2::theme_minimal(base_size = 15) +
  
  ggplot2::theme(
    plot.title = ggplot2::element_text(
      face = "bold",
      size = 20,
      hjust = 0.5
    ),
    
    plot.subtitle = ggplot2::element_text(
      hjust = 0.5,
      size = 12,
      face = "italic"
    )
  ) +
  
  ggplot2::labs(
    title = stringr::str_wrap(input$titulo_grafica, width = 45),
    
    subtitle = paste0(
      "TLC: distribución de medias muestrales | Media teórica = ",
      round(media_teorica, 4)
    ),
    
    x = "Media muestral",
    y = "Densidad"
  )
    
  }
  
  grafica
  
})

output$grafica <- plotly::renderPlotly({
  
  p <- plotly::ggplotly(
    grafica_base()
  )
  
  plotly::config(
    
    p,
    
    displaylogo = FALSE,
    
    modeBarButtonsToRemove = list(
      "pan2d",
      "select2d",
      "lasso2d",
      "zoomIn2d",
      "zoomOut2d",
      "autoScale2d",
      "hoverClosestCartesian",
      "hoverCompareCartesian",
      "toggleSpikelines"
    )
    
  )
  
})
```

```{r context="server", echo=FALSE}
output$descargar_reporte <- downloadHandler(
  
  filename = function() {
    
    nombre <- gsub(" ", "_", input$distribucion)
    
    paste0(
      "Reporte_",
      nombre,
      "_",
      Sys.Date(),
      ".png"
    )
    
  },
  
  contentType = "image/png",
  
  content = function(file) {
    
    resultado <- ""
    formula_texto <- ""
    formula_mostrar <- ""
    
    # =====================================
    # NORMAL
    # =====================================
    
    if(input$distribucion == "Normal"){
      
      formula_texto <- "Distribución Normal"
      
      formula_mostrar <- "$Z=\\frac{X-\\mu}{\\sigma}\\;\\;\\; f(x)=\\frac{1}{\\sigma\\sqrt{2\\pi}}e^{-\\frac{1}{2}(\\frac{x-\\mu}{\\sigma})^2}$"
      
      if(input$tipo_prob == "menor"){
        
        prob <- pnorm(
          input$limite,
          mean = input$media,
          sd = input$desviacion
        )
        
        resultado <- paste0(
          "P(X ≤ ",
          input$limite,
          ") = ",
          round(prob, 4)
        )
        
      } else if(input$tipo_prob == "mayor"){
        
        prob <- 1 - pnorm(
          input$limite,
          mean = input$media,
          sd = input$desviacion
        )
        
        resultado <- paste0(
          "P(X ≥ ",
          input$limite,
          ") = ",
          round(prob, 4)
        )
        
      } else{
        
        prob <- pnorm(
          input$limite_superior,
          mean = input$media,
          sd = input$desviacion
        ) -
          pnorm(
            input$limite_inferior,
            mean = input$media,
            sd = input$desviacion
          )
        
        resultado <- paste0(
          "P(",
          input$limite_inferior,
          " ≤ X ≤ ",
          input$limite_superior,
          ") = ",
          round(prob, 4)
        )
        
      }
      
    }
    
    # =====================================
    # T STUDENT
    # =====================================
    
    else if(input$distribucion == "T Student"){
      
      formula_texto <- "Distribución T Student"
      
      formula_mostrar <- "$T=\\frac{Z}{\\sqrt{V/v}}$"
      
      if(input$tipo_prob == "menor"){
        
        prob <- pt(input$limite, df = input$gl)
        
        resultado <- paste0(
          "P(X ≤ ",
          input$limite,
          ") = ",
          round(prob, 4)
        )
        
      } else if(input$tipo_prob == "mayor"){
        
        prob <- 1 - pt(input$limite, df = input$gl)
        
        resultado <- paste0(
          "P(X ≥ ",
          input$limite,
          ") = ",
          round(prob, 4)
        )
        
      } else{
        
        prob <- pt(input$limite_superior, df = input$gl) -
          pt(input$limite_inferior, df = input$gl)
        
        resultado <- paste0(
          "P(",
          input$limite_inferior,
          " ≤ X ≤ ",
          input$limite_superior,
          ") = ",
          round(prob, 4)
        )
        
      }
      
    }
    
    # =====================================
    # CHI CUADRADO
    # =====================================
    
    else if(input$distribucion == "Chi Cuadrado"){
      
      formula_texto <- "Distribución Chi Cuadrado"
      
      formula_mostrar <- "$f(x)=\\frac{1}{2^{k/2}\\Gamma(k/2)}x^{k/2-1}e^{-x/2}$"
      
      if(input$tipo_prob == "menor"){
        
        prob <- pchisq(input$limite, df = input$gl_chi)
        
        resultado <- paste0(
          "P(X ≤ ",
          input$limite,
          ") = ",
          round(prob, 4)
        )
        
      } else if(input$tipo_prob == "mayor"){
        
        prob <- 1 - pchisq(input$limite, df = input$gl_chi)
        
        resultado <- paste0(
          "P(X ≥ ",
          input$limite,
          ") = ",
          round(prob, 4)
        )
        
      } else{
        
        prob <- pchisq(
          input$limite_superior,
          df = input$gl_chi
        ) -
          pchisq(
            input$limite_inferior,
            df = input$gl_chi
          )
        
        resultado <- paste0(
          "P(",
          input$limite_inferior,
          " ≤ X ≤ ",
          input$limite_superior,
          ") = ",
          round(prob, 4)
        )
        
      }
      
    }
    
    # =====================================
    # F FISHER
    # =====================================
    
    else if(input$distribucion == "F Fisher"){
      
      formula_texto <- "Distribución F Fisher"
      
      formula_mostrar <- "$F=\\frac{(X/v_1)}{(Y/v_2)}$"
      
      if(input$tipo_prob == "menor"){
        
        prob <- pf(
          input$limite,
          df1 = input$gl1,
          df2 = input$gl2
        )
        
        resultado <- paste0(
          "P(X ≤ ",
          input$limite,
          ") = ",
          round(prob, 4)
        )
        
      } else if(input$tipo_prob == "mayor"){
        
        prob <- 1 - pf(
          input$limite,
          df1 = input$gl1,
          df2 = input$gl2
        )
        
        resultado <- paste0(
          "P(X ≥ ",
          input$limite,
          ") = ",
          round(prob, 4)
        )
        
      } else{
        
        prob <- pf(
          input$limite_superior,
          df1 = input$gl1,
          df2 = input$gl2
        ) -
          pf(
            input$limite_inferior,
            df1 = input$gl1,
            df2 = input$gl2
          )
        
        resultado <- paste0(
          "P(",
          input$limite_inferior,
          " ≤ X ≤ ",
          input$limite_superior,
          ") = ",
          round(prob, 4)
        )
        
      }
      
    }
    
    # =====================================
    # TLC
    # =====================================
    
    else{
      
      formula_texto <- "Teorema del Límite Central"
      
      formula_mostrar <- "$\\bar{X}\\approx N(\\mu,\\frac{\\sigma}{\\sqrt{n}})$"
      
      media_teorica <- input$k_binomial * input$p_binomial
      
      desviacion_teorica <- sqrt(
        (
          input$k_binomial *
          input$p_binomial *
          (1 - input$p_binomial)
        ) / input$n
      )
      
      resultado <- paste0(
  "Simulación con ",
  input$simulaciones,
  " muestras de tamaño ",
  input$n,
  "\n",
  "Media teórica = ",
  round(media_teorica, 4),
  " | Desviación estándar teórica = ",
  round(desviacion_teorica, 4)
)
      
    }
    
    # =====================================
    # CREAR PNG
    # =====================================
    
    png(
      file,
      width = 1800,
      height = 1400,
      res = 180,
      bg = "white"
    )
    
    grid::grid.newpage()
    
    # TÍTULO
    
    titulo_ajustado <- paste(strwrap(formula_texto, width = 32), collapse = "\n")

grid::grid.text(
  titulo_ajustado,
  y = 0.96,
  gp = grid::gpar(
    fontsize = 24,
    fontface = "bold",
    col = "#003366",
    lineheight = 0.9
  )
)
    
    # SUBTÍTULO
    
    grid::grid.text(
      "Fórmula:",
      y = 0.90,
      gp = grid::gpar(
        fontsize = 20,
        fontface = "bold",
        col = "#444444"
      )
    )
    
    # FÓRMULA
    
    grid::grid.draw(
      
      grid::textGrob(
        
        label = latex2exp::TeX(formula_mostrar),
        
        y = 0.84,
        
        gp = grid::gpar(
          fontsize = 16,
          col = "#003366"
        )
        
      )
      
    )
    
    # RESULTADO
    
    if(input$distribucion == "TLC"){
  
  grid::grid.text(
    resultado,
    y = 0.74,
    gp = grid::gpar(
      fontsize = 16,
      fontface = "bold",
      col = "#003366",
      lineheight = 1.1
    )
  )
  
} else{
  
  grid::grid.text(
    resultado,
    y = 0.75,
    gp = grid::gpar(
      fontsize = 18,
      fontface = "bold",
      col = "#003366"
    )
  )
  
}
    
    # GRÁFICA
    
    print(
  grafica_base(),
  vp = grid::viewport(
    x = 0.5,
    y = 0.34,
    width = 0.92,
    height = 0.68
  )
)
    
    dev.off()
    
  }
  
)
```

# Referencias
